title: Matching routes method - cab with many customers
abstract: The invention is about the sales of seats of the shuttle vehicles which serve as cabs to the passengers. Normally one person or a group takes a cab. The taxi cab takes the customer to the desired address. It receives the service fee in return. There are seats remain empty. Let's think that we have shuttle vehicles with a capacity of 7 passengers and those are travelling around our city. Let's imagine that the customers inform the host computer about their location and address they want to go through devices such as smart phones or similar computers and tablets. Let's think that our host computer responds to the calls of thousands of customers waiting in different locations. The route drawn between the location of the customer and the desired destination. For this route, the closest suitable shuttle vehicle is directed. But at the same time, it sets the host routes among the other customers that are compatible with this route. It also guides the shuttle vehicle to these customers. The shuttle vehicle also takes these customers. Thanks to similar routes, the shuttle car takes multiple customers at the same time. Passengers pay less. The cab makes more turnover. Less fuel is consumed. The people prefer shuttle vehicles rather than using their cars in the traffic. We will direct the most suitable shuttle vehicle for a maximum of 7 passengers and take them to the desired destination with the routes determined taking into account the optimum and traffic density.
claims:
Claims 1. The invention is a matching route method (5) enables the shuttle vehicle (1), which can see the taxi service, to take the same combination of 7 different customers to different destination in the most suitable combination, characterized in that; - Customer is transmitting his/ her call for cab thanks to the shuttle cab application (3) installed to the smart phones, tablets and computers, Thanks to the gps system on the smart phone the customer can transmit the location info automatically to the shuttle cab application (3), The customer can enter his/ her location on the map and time through the shuttle cab application (3-a) if he/ she is using a computer or a tablet without a gps, The customer can enter position information for an advanced time and place a call order, The customer can tag the target location he/ she desires on the map screen (3-a) in the shuttle cab application, The host computer (2) is capable of setting a price for each customer route and can obtain the payment confirmation, Customers with normal phones can call a taxi from the customer relationship department, be able to tell their location and destination addresses they want to reach, - The host computer software (2) is capable of dividing the city map into the grid areas/ regions up to a maximum of 7km * 7km, The host computer software can determine the location of calling customers included in each grid area and their target destinations, By means of the route management application (4) installed in the Smartphone or tablets mounted on our shuttle vehicles (1), it is possible to transmit their locations to the host computer (2) using wireless communication technologies, - The host computer's software (2) can determine the location and route of all shuttle vehicles(l) included in each and every grid, The host computer (2) can determine the best starting routes (5-a) for each customer contained in this grid area, Host software (2); For each starting route (5 - a), taking into account the positions which the customers in the shuttles (1) should take, it is possible to create all possible alternative routes for each customer and each shuttle vehicle, 

 The host computer's software (2) determines the costs of all these possible alternative routes and the time of arrival for each passenger, Among these, the lowest cost route is chosen by considering the customers' transportation time criteria and the most suitable dynamic route (5-b) can be determined by doing so, It is possible to determine the shuttle vehicle (1) for each customer, The vehicle which will be shown on the shuttle cab application (3) installed in the device of the customer is informed with an identification code such as " M 0047", On the map screen of the route management application (4) in the shuttle vehicle, the location of the customer to be taken is transmitted, The name of the customer and address to which she/he is going can be demonstrated, which ensures that the driver of the shuttle vehicle (1) can recognize and confirm the customer, On the map screen of the shuttle cab application (3-a); the position of the shuttle vehicle on the map, the progress and estimated time of arrival can be tracked by the customer, The customer can see the dynamic route (5-b) of the vehicle on the map screen of the shuttle cab application after he/ she gets on board the shuttle vehicle (1) till he/ she arrives the destination, As the calls for other new customers are received, the host computer (2) carries out the above specified procedures successively, The feature of the invention is characterized by the above specified procedural steps.
